base_prompt: Pixel-art sprite of bowser_fake_bridge_bowser_defeat — a effect_layer from 1985 super mario bros. Defeat animation — Bowser flips upside down and falls into lava after Mario hits axe. Centered on magenta (#FF00FF) background, 8-bit or 16-bit pixel-art aesthetic, no anti-aliasing, chunky pixels. Single canonical pose (frame 0 of animation).
source_progression_description: Defeat animation — Bowser flips upside down and falls into lava after Mario hits axe; 2 frames spanning rotation + disappear
